title: PvP Sounds
description: PvP Sound Pack changes the sounds in Minecraft to be better for PvP. The sounds in this pack make each action and each kill more satisfying
body:
PvP Sound Pack changes the sounds in Minecraft to be better for PvP. The sounds in this pack make each action and each kill more satisfying

This is my pack I made years ago & have been supporting for Bedrock Edition, ported over for Java users. If you want to hear some of the sounds in a video I will provide a link but be warned the video is old and new/more sounds have been added and some sounds I didn't like have been replaced/improved. Enjoy: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ojl2J4d1Zvs
